info.description: API for Hemra Şirow literary and biography website
info.title: Literary Backend API

get.description: Get the author biography

post.description: Create the initial author biography (multipart, optional photo)

get.description: Get biography timeline events in the specified language. Falls back to Turkmen if the requested language field is empty.
List all books

post.description: Create a new book. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional cover image and PDF upload.

get.description: Get a single book by id

put.description: Update an existing book. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional cover image and PDF upload.

delete.description: Delete an existing book by id

get.description: List all broadcasts

post.description: Create a new broadcast. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional audio/video upload.

get.description: Get a single broadcast by id

put.description: Update an existing broadcast. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional audio/video upload.

delete.description: Delete an existing broadcast by id

get.description: List all categories
Get a single category by id

put.description: Update an existing category by id

delete.description: Delete an existing category by id

get.description: List all films

post.description: Create a new film. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional video upload.

get.description: Get a single film by id

put.description: Update an existing film. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional video upload.

delete.description: Delete an existing film by id

get.description: List all personal letters

post.description: Create a new personal letter. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional scan upload.

get.description: Get a single personal letter by id

put.description: Update an existing personal letter. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional scan upload.

delete.description: Delete an existing personal letter by id

get.description: List all photo archive entries

post.description: Create a new photo archive entry. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional image upload.

get.description: Get a single photo archive entry by id

put.description: Update an existing photo archive entry. Supports JSON or multipart/form-data with optional image upload.

delete.description: Delete an existing photo archive entry by id

get.description: List all theatre productions
Get a single theatre production by id

delete.description: Delete an existing theatre production by id

get.description: List all translations by author

post.description: Create a new translation by author

get.description: Get a single translation by author by id

delete.description: Delete an existing translation by author by id

get.description: List all translations into language

post.description: Create a new translation into language

get.description: Get a single translation into language by id

delete.description: Delete an existing translation into language by id

get.description: List works with optional search, filters and pagination
Get single work by id

put.description: Update an existing work by id

delete.description: Delete an existing work by id
